name: Z West Apartments
quest: "One clutch play from ranking up, headset on, thumbs ready. Just need someone to help me land the shot before the round timer runs out. No pressure. Okay, some pressure."

name: Coratti's Gelato
quest: "The case is packed and the line's not getting any shorter — every flavor's fresh today, but I need a second pair of hands to scoop it out in time. Keep the beat with me and nothing melts."

name: Shapiro Library
quest: "Finals week chaos hit the stacks and I'm treating it like a match — reshelve the scattered books by color before I lose the sprint. Keep up, this is basically a scrimmage."
